base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ryu — a character (playable) from 1991 street fighter ii. Ryu — Hadouken/Shoryuken/Tatsumaki Senpukyaku (roundhouse-kick tornado). Shoto-archetype founder. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
